blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,846 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
